title: Director, Data Analytics & Digital Solutions
summary: Leads analytics modernization, intelligent automation, workflow transformation, governance, and AI-assisted workflow development for enterprise clients across financial services, healthcare, government, and insurance verticals. Manages multi-project portfolios with teams of up to 21 engineers across 15–20 concurrent engagements per year.
highlights: Spearheaded enterprise AI workflow initiatives including modular agent frameworks, prompt libraries, and documentation automation that reduced project onboarding time by ~35%.
Built ERP-integrated accounts-payable and billing automation workflows, eliminating manual processing backlogs and improving payment timeliness by 40%.
Architected Snowflake + Power BI modernization programs for financial-services clients managing assets ranging from $50B to $2.4T, delivering executive-ready reporting layers.
Designed and deployed semantic reporting layers and Azure Data Factory pipelines supporting multi-source data consolidation for regulatory and operational use cases.
Pioneered MCP-enabled development workflows with Claude and VS Code, accelerating internal team delivery velocity and documentation quality.
Developed AI-assisted RFP response system using modular workflow orchestration, cutting proposal turnaround from 5 days to under 2 days.
Supported major federal consent-order and OCC examination responses, coordinating governance, controls remediation, and data-quality workstreams.
Evaluated and applied local LLM tooling (Ollama, LM Studio) for offline workflow experimentation and air-gapped client environments.

title: Manager – Digital Accelerator & Audit
summary: Managed internal audit, IT risk assessment, issue validation, and automation-oriented delivery for banking, asset management, and education sector clients. Led a cross-functional team of 8 while overseeing IT governance, data governance, security, business continuity, and vendor risk advisory workstreams.
highlights: Developed IT risk assessment methodologies aligned to NIST, ISO 27001, and COBIT 2019 frameworks, adopted as firm-standard templates across the practice.
Built Alteryx-based automation workflows reducing audit testing cycle time by ~30% and improving budget performance on fixed-fee engagements.
Led IT governance, data governance, cybersecurity, BCP, and vendor risk reviews for Tier 1 banking and asset-management clients.
Achieved over 20% delivery efficiency gains through structured resource planning, standardized workpaper templates, and exception-focused testing approaches.
Managed relationships with C-suite and board-level stakeholders, presenting findings and remediation roadmaps for critical control gaps.
Supervised and mentored a team of 6–8 senior and staff associates across simultaneous engagements.

title: Senior IT Auditor
summary: Performed IT general controls, SOX, SOC 1 & 2, and application-control testing for major financial-services, insurance, and global exchange environments. Delivered audit work across ERP, database, infrastructure, and identity-management platforms.
highlights: Executed ITGC and application control testing across Oracle, SQL Server, PeopleSoft, and Hyperion environments for publicly traded financial institutions.
Supported SOC 1 (SSAE 18) and SOC 2 Type II reporting for global custodians and exchanges, ensuring PCAOB-compliant workpaper standards.
Led testing of identity and access management, change management, and incident response controls for critical trading and settlement systems.
Mentored 3 staff associates on structured ITGC testing methodology and documentation standards.

title: Staff IT Auditor (Intern → Full-time)
summary: Started as an intern and was converted to full-time staff, supporting operational and technology risk reviews across banking, technology, energy, and produce distribution environments. Gained early hands-on exposure to ERP audit, infrastructure review, and compliance documentation.
highlights: Completed IT audit support work across Great Plains, JD Edwards, Oracle Financials, and legacy AS/400 (OS400) environments.
Conducted risk interviews and walkthroughs for banking and energy sector clients under senior supervision.
Converted to full-time associate after demonstrating strong documentation quality and client presence during internship.

title: Revenue Examiner
summary: Audited individual and business tax returns in a high-volume compliance environment, applying federal and state tax codes and building early analytical discipline in a structured government regulatory setting.
highlights: Reviewed and resolved approximately 300 tax returns annually across individual and small-business filers.
Identified compliance gaps and coordinated resolution with taxpayers and their representatives.
Developed strong documentation and regulatory interpretation skills foundational to later audit career.
